data.text: TOO DIM, ONLY BRIGHT AREAS ARE THE POLES, WHICH ARE RELATIVELY
UNINTERESTING. SKY COLOR RANGES FROM BLUE TO GREEN, AND SURFACE COLOR
RANGES FROM ORANGE TO GREEN. ALSO HAS 2 MOONS.
ALMOST THE SAME AS ITS NEARBY COUSIN MOON. GREEN COLORATION, AVERAGE
OF ITS TYPE. NOTHING MUCH OF INTERESTING.
